theme_summary: Audit partial/failure status rules, exact launch counts, bundle completeness, and no false-success cases

consensus.notes: All 5 workers converged on consistent findings with high confidence

key_findings: Success threshold is 50 squad leads + 250 workers - explicit in stampede-commander.agent.md:140-146
CRITICAL GAP: stampede.sh has no guard for LAUNCHED==0 - continues even if all agents fail
Partial status only documented narratively for metaswarm - not in SKILL status schema
No explicit partial vs failed decision criteria documented
Banned-model triggers partial but not documented in SKILL.md or README
Bundle schema identical for all statuses - no pre-write completeness validation
Telemetry self-reported by commanders - no external verification
fleet.json written non-atomically - corruption risk on crash
critical_gaps: No post-launch watchdog or retry mechanism
No explicit timeout-failure path for stuck launches
No fleet-level state.json update on total launch failure
No cross-validation between PID files, tmux panes, and fleet.json
